title: polygala sellowiana
intro: Polygala sellowiana, also known as Selloviana, is a plant species in the Polygalaceae family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. Its health benefits are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, fever, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Polygala sellowiana include infusions and teas, which are often used to treat various ailments, and it can also be found in supplement form.
